title: Sim: price grid (2 products)
summary: Run every combination of three prices for two products (9 points).
oce_text:
[sim_db]
excel = "model.xlsx"

[["cs::sim_combinations"]]
scenarios = ["base"]
measures = "share|revenue"
expand_grid = true

["cs::sim_combinations".scenario_chgs.ProductA]
price = [9.0, 10.0, 11.0]

["cs::sim_combinations".scenario_chgs.ProductB]
price = [14.0, 15.0, 16.0]

title: Sim: parallel price movement (zip)
summary: Move two products together through three price points in parallel.
oce_text:
[sim_db]
excel = "model.xlsx"

[["cs::sim_combinations"]]
scenarios = ["base"]
measures = "share|revenue"
expand_grid = false

["cs::sim_combinations".scenario_chgs.ProductA]
price = [9.0, 10.0, 11.0]

["cs::sim_combinations".scenario_chgs.ProductB]
price = [14.0, 15.0, 16.0]

title: Sim: 2×2 feature matrix
summary: Evaluate all four combinations of two binary features on one product.
oce_text:
[sim_db]
excel = "model.xlsx"

[["cs::sim_combinations"]]
scenarios = ["base"]
measures = "share"
expand_grid = true

["cs::sim_combinations".scenario_chgs.ProductA]
feature_x = [0, 1]
feature_y = [0, 1]
